case_title: DAVID ESLER VS. PAUL P PACE

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY ESLER, DAVID PACE, PAUL P

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESLER, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACE, PAUL P $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,830.00 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,920.00, WRITTEN CONTRACT FOR $25,000 BUT DEFENDANT PAID ONLY $7,000. SO, $18,000 REMAINING AT 7% INTEREST UNPAID SINCE FEB. 2020. PLAINTIFF WAIVES EXCESS AMOUNT GIVEN RECOVERY LIMIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESLER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT PACE, PAUL P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S CORRECT ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT PACE, PAUL P
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESLER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT PACE, PAUL P

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2023 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY IMPROPER SERVICE TO DEC-05-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DAVID ESLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAUL P. PACE IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT STATES THAT SERVICE WAS SENT TO THE WRONG ADDRESS AND HE JUST RECENTLY BECAME AWARE OF THE CASE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AND REQUESTS FOR CONTINUANCE TO PREPARE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER DEFENDANT REQUEST TO PREPARE FOR CASE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF DAVID ESLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAUL PACE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN & D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2023 - JUDGMENT.
